message:
feat(tui): add FieldScope facet for subject/body search filtering (br-2bbt.18.1)

- Add FieldScope enum with SubjectAndBody, SubjectOnly, BodyOnly variants
- Add FacetSlot::FieldScope to facet cycling (now 6 facets total)
- Add field_scope field to SearchCockpitScreen state
- Implement FTS5 column filtering (subject:query, body_md:query)
- Update render_facet_rail to display Field facet
- Update toggle_active_facet and reset_facets handlers
- Add 8 unit tests for FieldScope cycling and filtering

Also includes partial work on br-2bbt.18.2:
- Add match count to Results header: "Results (42 matches)"
- Wire extract_snippet for match-centered snippet extraction

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
